name: FedTrust Federal Credit Union
description_short: FedTrust Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial cooperative offering savings accounts, loans, and banking services to individuals in the Memphis area.
description_long:
FedTrust Federal Credit Union is a member-owned and member-operated financial institution headquartered in Memphis, Tennessee at 167 N. Main Street, Suite 102. The credit union operates under the cooperative banking model where members are both customers and partial owners. The organization has been serving the Memphis community and operates with a philosophy emphasizing personal service and competitive rates.

FedTrust offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking and lending services. On the deposit side, members can open share savings accounts, share draft accounts (checking), Christmas Club accounts, share certificates of deposit, Convenient Money Certificates, Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs), and Insured Share Management Accounts (ISMA) with tiered options including Jumbo ISMA accounts. For borrowing needs, FedTrust provides auto loans for new and used vehicles, motorhome financing, motorcycle loans, conventional mortgages, and signature loans up to $15,000. All loan products require credit approval and are available through online application. The credit union also provides ATM/VISA debit cards with limited international ATM access (4 free withdrawals monthly at foreign ATMs, then $1 per transaction) and direct deposit capabilities.

FedTrust distinguishes itself through several operational features: it explicitly does NOT participate in the CO-OP Shared Branching Network, limiting members' branch access to their physical locations. The credit union operates limited hours (Monday-Friday, 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM) and maintains a traditional brick-and-mortar presence rather than a full digital-first model. They provide online banking through It'sMe247 Online Banking platform and offer multiple contact methods including CU*TALK phone service at (833) 394-4829. The institution emphasizes member relationship banking with personalized, confidential service rather than mass-market operations.

FedTrust Federal Credit Union is best suited for individuals already connected to the Memphis community or those with employer relationships that provide membership access. The lack of shared branching network participation and limited physical locations create accessibility constraints. Members should evaluate whether the competitive rates and personalized service justify these geographic limitations. The credit union represents a traditional community banking model with emphasis on member benefits rather than digital convenience.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Member-owned cooperative structure means profits return to members as dividend returns on deposits
Competitive loan products with online application capability across multiple loan types (auto, mortgage, signature, motorcycle, motorhome)
Signature loans up to $15,000 available for unexpected expenses without collateral
IRA and retirement savings options with stated higher dividend rates than competing institutions
Free foreign ATM withdrawals (4 per month) with VISA debit card, reducing travel costs
Convenient Money Certificates allow flexible deposits and withdrawals (1 per month) with tiered rate structures based on deposit amounts
Christmas Club accounts with no minimum deposit requirement and automatic transfer scheduling
cons: NOT a member of CO-OP Shared Branching Network, severely limiting branch access compared to other credit unions
Very limited operating hours (Monday-Friday 9:00 AM - 4:00 PM only) with no weekend service
Only one physical branch location in Memphis, Tennessee restricts accessibility for non-local members
Insured Share Management Account (ISMA) requires $3,000 minimum balance with strict withdrawal limits, reducing flexibility
Early withdrawal fee of $15 on Christmas Club accounts if withdrawn before October transfer date
best_for: Memphis-area residents or employees with payroll deduction eligibility seeking personalized service and member-owner benefits
Individuals seeking traditional mortgage, auto, or motorcycle financing with competitive rates and personal service
Members prioritizing retirement savings through IRAs and certificates with higher dividend rates than standard banks
Borrowers needing signature loans up to $15,000 without collateral requirements for life events or consolidation
diagnosis: FedTrust Federal Credit Union is best for Memphis-area residents or individuals with employer membership eligibility seeking traditional credit union banking with member-owner benefits and personalized service. The primary caveat is severe geographic limitation—the lack of CO-OP Shared Branching Network participation and single branch location make this impractical for members living outside the immediate Memphis area or requiring frequent branch access beyond Monday-Friday 9-4 hours.
services: Christmas Club savings accounts with automatic transfers and early withdrawal penalties
Share certificates of deposit with higher dividend rates
Convenient Money Certificates (1 and 2-year terms with flexible deposits/withdrawals)
Individual Retirement Accounts (IRAs) in accumulation or certificate formats
Insured Share Management Accounts (ISMA) with $3,000 minimum balance and Jumbo ISMA with $100,000 minimum
Auto loans for new and used vehicles, SUVs, and trucks
Motorhome loans for RV purchases and financing
Conventional mortgage lending for home purchases
Signature loans up to $15,000 for personal expenses
VISA debit cards with ATM access and international withdrawal allowances
It'sMe247 online banking platform for account management
Direct deposit and payroll deduction services
Wire transfers and check processing services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
